title: Wemmbu Farlands
description: It adds back the classic farlands with plugins.
body:
### WEMMBU FARLANDS | 1.21.x |

This mod adds back the minecraft farlands from beta 1.7 as it also recreates wemmbus farlands current stages.

### Features

Normal Farlands

### Installation Guide

1. You need a papermc server 1.21.x
2. Take the jar you get from downloading it and out it into the plugins folder
3. And the plugin will work like that

Hope you guys support the project thank you.
